title: CAM Assist Strategy Package Manifest Schema
description: Defines a portable manifest that bundles strategy JSON, review packet, and geometry references. All paths are relative to manifest location.

manifest_version.description: Semantic version of the manifest format

strategy_file.description: Path to strategy JSON file, relative to manifest location

review_packet_file.description: Path to review packet Markdown file, relative to manifest location

source_geometry_files.description: Paths to source geometry files (DXF, etc.), relative to manifest location

cam_assist_version.description: Version of CAM Assist that created this package

non_execution_declaration.description: MUST be true. This package does not authorize execution.

execution_authority_claim.description: MUST be false. This package does not claim execution authority.

requires_human_review.description: MUST be true. Human review is required before downstream use.

derivation_notes.description: Notes on how this package was derived
